Video.summary: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida; Charleston, South Carolina; and Juneau, Alaska.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather.
Video.title: Tying the Knot at 13,000 Feet

Video.summary: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?
Video.title: A Newly-Wed Recipe for Disaster

Video.summary: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?
Video.title: Theodora's Room

Video.summary: Jason experiences insecurity about challenges that the couple are, quite literally, dropped into. From falling out of the sky to a rappel into a dark cave, will the couple be able to work together or will they end up stranded in the dark?
Video.title: Marriage Lows

Video.summary: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ken Whiting travels to Juneau, Alaska to paddle with whales, bears, glaciers and icebergs on a multi-day sea kayaking adventure.
Video.title: Paddling Juneau, Alaska

Video.summary: The couple head to southwestern Oklahoma to climb Quartz Mountain but when Jason's confidence is shaken during a failed slab climb, Tayler realizes she may need to prepare to carry a larger load on their journey out west.
Video.title: You Do What?

Video.summary: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?
Video.title: Trust Me!

Video.summary: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of Americaĺs oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.
Video.title: The Main Event: Alabama

Video.summary: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the cityĺs heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mÚlange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. ôThereĺs this Ĺall senses on overloadĺ side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.ö
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim kicks off his journey in Virginia Beach, a coastal gem with a deep-rooted fishing heritage. But Mother Nature has her own plansŚas storm clouds roll in, Jim has a challenge ahead: tagging his first Redfish for NOAA to help track its migration.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Musicians Foy Vance and Laetitia Sheriff head to the US to discover some of the country's most iconic cities.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFFĺs Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberlyĺs ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise ľ a toast with Kentuckyĺs own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. Ĺs horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberlyĺs horse wins the race. At Louisvilleĺs Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: American cities have long played a starring role in its cinema. Notable actors and directors, including Hilary Swank, Helen Hunt, and Colman Domingo, tell stories about their favorite U.S. cities.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A film inspired by Voices of the Guardians, an album by Gareth Laffely and Lance Bendiksen, that combines the songs and stories of Native American tribes with modern western music.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: John goes skijoring for the first time, then stops by the Idaho Sled Dog Challenge,
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Eric Hanson explores the mountains, trails and winter landscapes of West Virginia.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within Americaĺs most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
Video.title: National Parks Adventure

Video.summary: Coney Island, New York hosts its annual Mermaid Parade, and sand sculpting pros battle in Manitowoc, Wisconsin.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Coney Island & Manitowoc

Video.summary: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Key West & Wrightsville

Video.summary: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Image.alt: Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach
Beach Battles: Winchester Bay & Long Beach

Video.summary: Paddle into Dog Surfing in Pacifica, California, and get picking at the Crab Derby in Crisfield, Maryland.
Video.title: Beach Battles: Pacifica & Crisfield

Video.summary: Dylan explores the world of Hatch chilis and meets the farmers and community in this New Mexico valley known for bringing these unique peppers to life - one tingly, tasty, spicy bite at a time.
Video.title: Chili Capital of the World

Video.summary: One day each year in Fayetteville, West Virginia, scores of people throw caution to the wind and jump off a 876' bridge into the Gorge below.
Video.title: Bridge Day

Video.summary: Jim lands in Maine to meet the faces behind one of the top seafood scenes in the U.S. From Portland to North Haven, itĺs all about experiencing true coastal life from the Mainers' point of view. Jim then checks off a bucket list moment: smallmouth fishing on the legendary Grand Lake.
Video.title: Maine

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica head to Virginia Beach where theyĺre tasked by celebrity chef Cliff Crooks to create the ultimate cheat meal for a local restaurateur. Armed with the power of their taste buds, the dynamic duo checks out the best places to eat, including Oishii Burger, Chickĺs Oyster Bar and Klassic Doughnuts, to build an off-the-charts meal of epic portions.
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 1

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica dive back into Virginia Beach's vibrant food scene to build the ultimate cheat meal for George Culver, the food-loving force behind the popular @iheartfoodvb. From the tropical vibes at Moxy Virginia Beach to the game-filled hangouts at Beachside Social, and the delightful flavors of Oh Mochi, De Rican Chef, and Belvedere South, they pull out all the stops to craft a meal thatĺs as unforgettable as it is indulgent!
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 2

Video.summary: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Marioĺs Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.
Video.title: Cheat Meal: Galveston

Video.summary: The next stop on Sorted Food's Epic Southern Road Trip is Savannah, Georgia. In 48 hours they must learn all they can about local culture and cuisine before hosting a dinner party for local chefs to showcase what theyĺve learned about Southern food and hospitality. Will the guys be able to learn enough in such a short period of time?
Video.title: Savannah

Video.summary: After exploring Savannah, Georgia for 48 hours learning the ropes of Southern food and hospitality, Chef Ben, Jamie and Mike try hosting a dinner party for local chefs, food writers and Savannah natives. How will these expectant locals react?
Video.title: Savannah Part 2

Video.summary: Eric travels to the mountain towns of Durango and Telluride, Colorado to explore the backcountry by ski, snowshoe, and ice axe.
Video.title: Backpacking Durango, Colorado

Video.summary: Eric explores Utahĺs breathtaking slot canyons on a multi-day backpacking adventure.
Video.title: Backpacking Utahĺs Canyon Country

Video.summary: Touring Delaware, Raheim pushes Tatyanna to her limits above the trees before coming back to the ground to get a little history lesson and a fantastic local brew. And in this episode of firsts, Raheim is on his own to catch some waves.
Video.title: Wilmington, Delaware: Surf's Up

Video.summary: Raheim Robinson meets up with his buddy Clark Robinson (and no, theyĺre not related) to see if their shared passion for outdoor adventures will endure three climates across three Counties in three days.
Video.title: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah

Image.alt: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah
Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah
Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah

Video.summary: In El Paso, Texas, Raheim coaches new mom and aspiring mountain biker Isabel as she rides rocky desert descents in the Franklin Mountains. Then, Raheim visits an ancient bouldering field, Hueco Tanks, home to wild west graffiti and rock art.
Video.title: El Paso: Conquering Mountains

Video.summary: Chef Ben and the gang arrive in Texasĺ BIGGEST city, Houston. With new challenges in store, will they level the leaderboard?
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: Houston Part 1

Video.summary: The Sorted guys go head to head in a street food fusion battle in Texasĺ BIGGEST city, Houston. Who will come out on top?!
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: Houston Part 2

Video.summary: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ken Whiting explores the rivers, lakes and caves around Lake Guntersville, Alabama by kayak.
Video.title: Kayaking Alabama

Video.summary: We learn the kite ballet and soar to new heights at the annual kite-festival in the blustery sea-side town of Morro Bay.
Video.title: Letĺs Go Fly a Kite!

Video.summary: Sorted heads to Puerto Rico to find the best food this beautiful island has to offer.
Video.title: Puerto Rico Street Food Face Off

Image.alt: Puerto Rico Street Food Face Off
Puerto Rico Street Food Face Off
Puerto Rico Street Food Face Off

Video.summary: Near Colorado National Monument, Raheim teaches amateur weightlifter Jaime how to leverage her strength on the Millennium Falcon, a red sandstone overhang. In Rabbit Valley, they rip through epic desert trails on off-road vehicles.
Video.title: Grand Junction: Lightspeed Heavy Lift

Video.summary: Chef Ben and his three foodie friends are on a mission to explore the BIGGEST and BEST food in Texas through a series of food challenges. They begin their journey in San Antonio, home to Big Lou's huge 62 inch pizza.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: San Antonio Part 1

Video.summary: Chef Ben and the guys continue their Texas adventure in San Antonio, with a quick stop in the coastal city of Corpus Christi.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
Video.title: San Antonio Part 2
